The BTC/Silver chart highlights two important points:

• Historical behavior shows a very similar pattern in past cycles.

Important note:

Since November, Bitcoin has stopped tracking Silver closely and has entered a phase of consolidation and range-bound movement. This divergence is a positive signal and may indicate a potential change in the broader market behavior.
The key takeaway:

The chart is now sitting on a very strong support zone, suggesting an imminent high-impact move.

Bitcoin breaks higher, confirming strength and behavioral shift

Silver corrects sharply, relieving pressure on BTC
